name: Groq
description: Registers Groq as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with upstream model discovery.

env.description: Fallback Groq API key used for discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Groq API key
settings.description: Groq API key used for model discovery and inference. Falls back to GROQ_API_KEY.

providers.name: Groq
providers.description: Refreshes Groq chat models from the upstream catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
